verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're a man of Your word, yeah Here we go, this is what it says

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All things are possible When we believe Old chains are breakable When we receive Yahweh You keep Your promises

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it, hey!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it You're a man of Your word, yeah, sing it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I know all things are possible When we believe And old chains are breakable When we receive Yahweh You keep Your promises

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it (sing it out)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We have this confidence You'll finish what You started God, You have never failed You won't start with me You're present in every step Patient in every heartache God, You have never failed You won't start with me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Everybody right now, hey, hey (Hey, hey, hey) One time, sing it

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it (hey!) Yeah If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it You're a man of Your word

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: We have this confidence You'll finish what You started God, You have never failed You won't start with me You're present in every step Patient in every heartache God, You have never failed You won't start with me You won't start with me

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Oh yeah Yeah, yeah I believe it Yes I believe it One time, sing it

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it ('cause You're a man, now sing) 'Cause You're a man of Your word (if You said it) If You said it, we believe it (if You said it, we believe it, yes) If You said it, we believe it (yeah) 'Cause You're a man of Your word

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it If You said it, yeah If You said it, we believe it If You said it If You said I'm healed, I'm

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: If You said it, I believe it If You said it If You say I'm free in my mind If You said it yeah, we believe it, yeah If You said it (if You said it) If You said it, (we believe) we believe it If You said it

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: I am who You say I am (If You said it, we believe it) I am who You say I am (If You said it, we believe it) I am who You say I am I am who You say I am I am who You say I am I am who You say I am I am who You say I am

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: I am who You say I am (you're a son, you're a daughter) I am who You say I am (said You're never forsaken) I am who You say I am (You're the beloved of God) I am who You say I am (I am who You say I am) I am who You say I am (I am who You say I am) I am who You say I am I am who You say I am

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it Yeah, hey Sing it out y'all, sing! If You said it, we believe it (yeah, yeah) 'Cause You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word, yeah

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: Your Word is written in stone It's a thing we can always count on You honor Your word You'll never have to repent 'Cause You'll never go against what You say

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: If You said it, we believe it 'Cause You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it If You said it, we believe it You're a man of Your word If You said it, we believe it Last time If You said it, we believe it You're a man of Your word

verse.name: v21
verse.lines: I am (I am who You say I am) And I am what I am (I am who You say I am) 'Cause the Great I Am, speaks over me (I am who You say I am) And I am what I am (I am who You say I am) 'Cause the Great I Am Said He speaks over me (I am who You say I am)

verse.name: v22
verse.lines: And what You say is true Said, I am what I am (I am who You say I am) 'Cause the Great I Am Said He speaks over me (yes he does) And His Word is true Said I am what I am 'Cause the Great I Am speaks over me (Yes he does, yes he does) (Yes he does, yes he does)

verse.name: v23
verse.lines: I am what I am 'Cause the Great I Am said He speaks over me (Yes he does, yes he does) I am what I am 'Cause the Great I Am, said He speaks over me
